HEADLINE:

By automatically adjusting color temperature and brightness based on your calendar, the time of day, and your room's lighting, Lumina creates the perfect environment for focus, creativity, and wellbeing without you lifting a finger.

Whether you're diving into a 9 AM strategy session, pushing through an afternoon slump, or wrapping up emails at dusk, Lumina intuitively shifts its light to support your natural circadian rhythm and enhance your productivity. No more harsh blue light when you should be winding down. No more dim, straining light during your most important meetings. Just perfect lighting, every moment.

At $149, Lumina is the smartest investment you can make for your remote workspace—transforming not just how you work, but how you feel while you're working.

• Your Calendar - It knows when you have back-to-back meetings and optimizes light for focus

• Your Room - It reads ambient lighting and adjusts to be neither too harsh nor too dim

The result? Better focus, reduced eye strain, improved sleep quality, and a workspace that actually supports your productivity instead of fighting against it.

At just $149, Lumina is launching today with an exclusive early-bird offer. The first 500 customers get 20% off—that's just $119.

Ready to transform your work environment?

Here's to better focus, better energy, and better sleep.

The Lumina Team

Q7: WHAT IF I TRAVEL OR CHANGE TIME ZONES?

A: Lumina automatically adjusts for your location and time zone. No action needed on your part. If you travel, Lumina continues to optimize based on the local time where you are, keeping you aligned with your circadian rhythm.

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

Q8: HOW MUCH DOES LUMINA COST TO OPERATE?

A: Lumina uses efficient LED technology that costs approximately $8 per year to operate 24/7 (at US average electricity rates of $0.14 per kWh). Most users operate it only during work hours, so actual cost is even lower.

---

Light That Works As Hard As You Do
